_publications._publicationTitle: Identification of erythrocyte p55/MPP1 as a binding partner of NF2 tumor suppressor protein/Merlin.

_contextSnippet: Merlin was stained along with Caspr, which is a marker for the paranode in the teased fibers of mouse nerves...Prominent staining of merlin was observed at the Schmidt-Lanterman incisures as well as at the paranode
details: Successfully used as paranode marker in teased fibers of mouse nerves, showed colocalization with merlin at the paranode
